mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is falling, discount-rate pressure eases and equity multiples expand. This should lift S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days, with the effect strongest when inflation is not accelerating.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS declines for at least 2 consecutive monthly observations
failure_condition: Rejected if 20-day SPX returns are not positive more often than negative after FEDFUNDS decline triggers, or if the effect disappears when CPIAUCSL inflation is rising for 3 months.

mechanism_narrative: A rising UNRATE signals deteriorating household income and weaker demand, which should pressure equities downward over the next month. The signal is strongest when PAYEMS is also slowing, confirming labor-market damage rather than a measurement artifact.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Rejected if triggered UNRATE increases are followed by positive 20-day SPX returns in a majority of cases, or if the signal remains negative when PAYEMS is flat or rising.

mechanism_narrative: Strength in RSAFS indicates resilient consumer spending and better top-line revenue conditions for large-cap firms. Sustained sales growth should support positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter through earnings revision momentum.
failure_condition: Rejected if positive 3-month changes in RSAFS are not associated with above-median 60-day SPX returns, or if the sign reverses across multiple walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: Rising INDPRO together with higher HOUST signals broad real activity and construction demand, which should improve earnings expectations and support equities over the next 20 trading days. The mechanism fails when industrial gains come with falling housing, indicating sectoral divergence instead of broad expansion.
failure_condition: Rejected if the joint increase in INDPRO and HOUST does not improve 20-day SPX return hit rates versus either series alone, or if returns are negative despite both series rising.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in CPIAUCSL inflation raises the probability of tighter future policy and multiple compression, which should push S&P 500 returns negative over the following 20 trading days. The effect is activated only when inflation accelerates enough to force a policy repricing.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL inflation accelerates by more than 0.2 percentage points on a 3-month annualized basis
failure_condition: Rejected if inflation acceleration triggers are followed by positive SPX returns more often than negative, or if the effect is absent even when FEDFUNDS is near the zero lower bound and inflation is rising.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous slowdown in GDPC1 and RSAFS indicates weakening real demand and lower corporate revenue growth, which should depress S&P 500 returns over the next quarter. This is a recession-risk signal, not a pure valuation effect.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 and RSAFS both decline on their latest available readings versus prior releases
failure_condition: Rejected if coincident declines in GDPC1 and RSAFS are not followed by negative 60-day SPX returns more often than not, or if the joint signal is no stronger than random over rolling out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: A low and stable UNRATE supports consumption confidence and reduces recession pricing, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days. The signal should weaken when PAYEMS is contracting, because labor-market breadth is then deteriorating despite headline unemployment stability.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE remains flat or falls over the latest month and PAYEMS is not declining
failure_condition: Rejected if low/stable UNRATE conditions do not yield positive 5-day SPX returns relative to baseline, or if the edge disappears in periods where PAYEMS is clearly contracting.

mechanism_narrative: When INDPRO is weakening while HOUST also falls, the economy is signaling a synchronized production and housing downturn. That combination should produce negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days as earnings expectations are revised down.
failure_condition: Rejected if synchronized declines in INDPRO and HOUST fail to precede negative 20-day SPX returns, or if the joint signal performs no better than either proxy alone.
